Common.comingSoonDesc: This section is being built. Check back soon.

Sell.title: Sell on Hezalli
Sell.subtitle: Open your store in minutes and reach buyers across Yemen. No approval wait — start listing right away.
Sell.benefitPayments: Get paid by COD, wallets, bank transfer, or USDT
Sell.benefitCommission: Only 10% commission, charged on completed orders
Sell.storeDescriptionHint: What do you sell? Tell buyers about your store.
Sell.acceptSellerTerms: I agree to the seller terms: accurate listings, honoring orders, and the 10% commission on completed orders.
Sell.kycNote: Identity verification (KYC) is not required to start selling — you'll complete it later to receive payouts.
Sell.signInPrompt: Sign in or create an account to open your store.
Sell.storeNameShort: Store name must be at least 2 characters
Sell.phoneTaken: This phone number is already in use
Sell.termsRequired: Please accept the seller terms to continue
Sell.notSignedIn: Please sign in and try again
Sell.createFailed: Could not open the store. Please try again.

SellerDashboard.title: Dashboard
SellerDashboard.suspendedBanner: Your store is suspended and hidden from buyers. Contact Hezalli support if you believe this is a mistake.
SellerDashboard.noOrders: No orders yet — they'll appear here as buyers order from your store.
SellerDashboard.ordersNote: Full order management arrives in the checkout phase.

Payout.title: Payout details
Payout.desc: Where Hezalli sends your earnings. One destination for now — bank, mobile wallet, or USDT.
Payout.kycVerified: Identity verified — payouts are unlocked once payout processing launches.
Payout.kycPending: Payouts also require identity verification (KYC). You can add your destination now; verification opens with the payouts phase.
Payout.addressInvalid: This address doesn't match the selected network
Payout.notSignedIn: Please sign in and try again
Payout.notSeller: You don't have a store yet

SellerSettings.title: Store settings
SellerSettings.desc: Brand your store and set your policies.
SellerSettings.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only. Changing it changes your public store link.
SellerSettings.imagesSoon: Logo and banner upload are coming with image storage — a placeholder banner is shown until then.
SellerSettings.nameShort: Store name must be at least 2 characters
SellerSettings.slugShort: Store URL must be at least 2 characters
SellerSettings.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only
SellerSettings.slugTaken: This store URL is already taken
SellerSettings.notSignedIn: Please sign in and try again
SellerSettings.notSeller: You don't have a store yet

SellerProducts.title: Products
SellerProducts.listDesc: Create and manage your product listings.
SellerProducts.empty: No products yet. Add your first one to start selling.
SellerProducts.confirmArchive: Archive the selected product(s)? You can restore them later.
SellerProducts.moderatedNotice: This product was moderated by Hezalli. Reason: {reason}
SellerProducts.imagesHint: Up to 8 images. The first is the cover.
SellerProducts.variantsHint: Set a price and stock. Add options like size or color to create variants.
SellerProducts.hasOptions: This product has options (e.g. size, color)
SellerProducts.notSignedIn: Please sign in and try again.
SellerProducts.notSeller: You don't have a store yet.
SellerProducts.skuTaken: A SKU is already used by another product. Please change it.
SellerProducts.titleArRequired: Enter an Arabic title to publish
SellerProducts.imageRequired: Add at least one image to publish
SellerProducts.variantsRequired: At least one variant is required
SellerProducts.skuInvalid: SKU: letters, numbers, dash, dot, underscore only
SellerProducts.pricePublish: Price must be more than 0 to publish
SellerProducts.compareInvalid: Compare-at price must be higher than the price

StorePage.noProductsYet: This store hasn't listed any products yet.
StorePage.productsComing: {count} products — the product grid arrives with the catalog phase.

AdminSellers.title: Sellers
AdminSellers.desc: Sellers onboard automatically. Suspend abusive stores here; KYC review unlocks payouts in a later phase.

Auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Hezalli account
Auth.registerSubtitle: Join Hezalli to shop from sellers across Yemen
Auth.name: Full name
Auth.acceptTerms: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
Auth.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
Auth.termsRequired: Please accept the terms to continue
Auth.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists
Auth.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
Auth.registeredLoginManually: Your account was created. Please sign in.
Auth.forbiddenDesc: You don't have permission to view this page.

Account.title: My account
Account.profileDesc: Update your name and contact details.
Account.name: Full name
Account.photoSoon: Photo upload is coming with image storage.
Account.changePasswordDesc: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
Account.deleteWarning: This permanently closes your account. Type DELETE to confirm.
Account.addressesDesc: Manage where your orders are delivered.
Account.noAddresses: You have no saved addresses yet.
Account.phoneTaken: This phone number is already in use
Account.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
Account.noPasswordSet: This account has no password set

Footer.protection: Hezalli Buyer Protection — money back if it never arrives or isn't as described.

Home.heroTitle: Everything you need, from sellers across Yemen
Home.heroSubtitle: Shop electronics, fashion, groceries and more. Pay by cash on delivery, local wallet, bank transfer, or USDT.

AdminProducts.title: Products
AdminProducts.desc: Every product across all sellers. Hide or remove violating products — the seller is notified with your reason.
AdminProducts.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.

AdminCategories.title: Categories
AdminCategories.desc: Build the category tree buyers browse. Drag order via the position field.
AdminCategories.deleteBlockedHint: Categories with products or subcategories can't be deleted.
AdminCategories.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
AdminCategories.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only
AdminCategories.parentMissing: The selected parent no longer exists
AdminCategories.parentCycle: A category can't be nested under itself

AdminBrands.title: Brands
AdminBrands.desc: Manage the brands sellers can assign to their products.
AdminBrands.name: Brand name
AdminBrands.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
AdminBrands.nameTaken: A brand with this name already exists
AdminBrands.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only

Product.cartComingSoon: Cart arrives in the next phase — coming soon.
Product.reviewsComingSoon: Customer reviews arrive with the reviews phase.
Product.returnsDefault: Returns accepted within 7 days of delivery, per Hezalli's buyer protection policy.
Product.shippingDefault: Ships from the seller within Yemen. Shipping fees depend on your governorate and are shown at checkout.
Product.wishlistComingSoon: Wishlist arrives in the next phase — coming soon.

Search.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or browse a category.

AdminBanners.desc: Manage the home page hero banners.
AdminBanners.empty: No banners yet. Add one to feature it on the home page.

Cart.title: Shopping cart
Cart.emptyHint: Browse products and add them to your cart.
